Urinary Tract Infection (UTI) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of urinary tract infection (UTI) in the last seven 30 days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
287 I2400_VRL_HPT_CD I2400_VRL_HPT_CD I2400 Active Diagnoses: Viral Hepatitis Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of viral hepatitis (e.g., Hepatitis A, B, C, D and E) in the last seven days. -=Not
